stemHtml: The pilots of an aircraft wish to initiate the final approach at 1500 ft. The pilots turn towards the final heading, continue the approach and after a while they execute a go-around manoeuvre. What is the sensation of the passengers in the correct sequence?

options.a: Linear acceleration, angular acceleration, vertical acceleration upwards.
options.b: Angular acceleration, linear deceleration, vertical acceleration upwards.
options.c: Linear deceleration, angular acceleration, vertical acceleration downwards.
options.d: Angular acceleration, linear deceleration, vertical acceleration downwards.
